policy.purpose: Freeze existing architecture debt so future AI/CI runs fail on newly introduced debt or growth in baselined hotspots.
policy.removal: warning until this file is cleaned
policy.baselineGrowth: blocked on PR when AI_BASELINE_COMPARE_REF is set

acceptedWarnings.target: Move shared parsing helpers to platform/analytics or a neutral utility.
acceptedWarnings.rationale: Existing architecture debt observed before hard governance was introduced; accepted only as a frozen cleanup target, not as permission to grow.
